tone_guidelines: Be vivid, adventurous, and informative. Paint pictures with words — make the audience feel like they're there. Balance wanderlust inspiration with practical logistics. Audience expects detailed tips, budget breakdowns, and hidden gems.
audience_archetype: Travel enthusiasts, digital nomads, and vacation planners seeking destination inspiration, practical guides, and budget-friendly strategies

platform_hints.youtube: Cinematic travel vlogs with drone footage, destination guides with timestamps, budget breakdowns with graphics.
platform_hints.tiktok: Quick destination reveals, 'places you NEED to visit' lists, travel hack tips, food tours.
platform_hints.instagram: Stunning landscape photography, location-tagged carousels, story highlights by destination.
platform_hints.linkedin: Business travel tips, remote work destination guides, travel industry insights.
platform_hints.podcast: Destination deep dives, traveler interviews, cultural exploration discussions.
platform_hints.blog: Comprehensive itineraries with maps, packing lists, budget spreadsheets, and booking links.
platform_hints.twitter: Travel deals, quick tips, live trip updates, poll-based destination debates.

engagement_rules: Open with the most visually stunning or surprising moment from the trip
Include specific prices, durations, and logistics — not just vibes
Mention hidden gems and local-only experiences
Provide morning-to-night itineraries for easy viewer replication
End with a 'would I go back?' honest verdict
